content: Finished the interim analysis for mRNA-4157. Uploading the updated SAP to the shared drive now. Mark, let me know if you want to review before I send to Rebecca.
Brian — looks good. One comment on Table 4: the CI bounds for the secondary endpoint look wider than I expected. Can you double-check the pooled variance calculation?
Reminder: the mRNA-4157 interim analysis deliverable is due Feb 12 2027. Brian has the lead. Please flag any data queries to him by end of month.
All-hands on Thursday at 3pm ET. Please have your Q3 updates ready. Dial-in link in the calendar invite.
Anyone tried the new survival analysis package in R 4.4? Curious if it handles time-varying covariates cleanly. Running into some edge cases with interval-censored data.
